runs.strategic_narrative: Mojo's Take: Your Meta Ads CPL has surged to ₹708, which is unacceptable given your strong pacing at 97% of the linear target. Cut the fat in your TOFU creatives and aggressive retargeting to lower that CPL and maximize your CVR before the inefficiency eats away your ROI.

Mojo's Take: Your Meta Ads CPL has significantly improved to ₹397, but you're only pacing at 31% of the linear target, indicating a lack of scale. Ramp up your budget or optimize your TOFU strategies to capture more volume and boost your CVR before you plateau.
